steps.title: Find the singular subject
steps.content: The subject of the blank is "her writing," which is singular. The verb must agree with that subject, even though the surrounding sentences discuss Harris and her earlier contest win.

steps.title: Use singular agreement
steps.content: A, B, and D are plural verb forms, so they do not agree with the singular subject "writing." The needed form is singular and fits the idea that her writing was honored before. The answer is C.
